overview: The image shows a Tortoise Bont Tick (Amblyomma marmoreum), a species of hard-backed tick. These ticks are commonly found parasitizing reptiles, especially tortoises. The species is native to southern Africa. Similar species in the Amblyomma genus are known to transmit various tick-borne diseases. iNaturalist +1 2 sites Tortoise Bont Tick (Amblyomma marmoreum) · iNaturalist

The image shows a Tortoise Bont Tick (Amblyomma marmoreum), a species of hard-backed tick.
These ticks are commonly found parasitizing reptiles, especially tortoises.
The species is native to southern Africa.
Similar species in the Amblyomma genus are known to transmit various tick-borne diseases.
